scripts.css-js: aws s3 sync dist/ s3://DomainName.com --acl=public-read  --delete --cache-control='max-age=31536000' --exclude '*' --include '*.css' --include '*.js' && npm run html
scripts.html: aws s3 sync dist/ s3://DomainName.com --acl=public-read  --delete --cache-control='max-age=0, no-cache' --exclude '*' --include '*.html'
scripts.deploy: aws s3 sync dist/ s3://DomainName.com --size-only --acl=public-read  --delete --cache-control='max-age=31536000' --exclude '*.html' --exclude '*.css' --exclude '*.js' && npm run css-js
scripts.deploy-dev: aws s3 sync dist/ s3://www.summitathletics-dev.com/ProjectFoler/DomainName --size-only --acl=public-read --delete --cache-control='max-age=0, no-cache' --exclude '*.html' --exclude '*.css' --exclude '*.js' && npm run html-dev
